author: pk910
content:
hmm,  builder 0 is actually configured to reveal at 4s into the slot.
But the timeline shows that even when configured to reveal at 4s, the submission time fluctuates quite a lot:
https://api-buildoor-prysm-ethrex-1.srv.glamsterdam-devnet-7.ethpandaops.io/  (purple bubble appears way later than 4s)
I think the submission call consumes the time.

author: terencechain
content: what's the submission call here? beacon api's end point? which client is it using?

author: terencechain
content: i bet you that's under optimized or something

author: pk910
content: It's buildoor-prysm-ethrex-1  and using the local BN api to submit the signed envelope

author: terencechain
content:
lmao, of course it's us 🙂

author: pk910
content:
Can I change all builders to reveal at 4s?
Feels a bit odd that only 0 reveals at 4s, the others at 5s

author: terencechain
content: why not do the proper thing.. look at attestations weight.. and no equivocation.. etc

author: pk910
content:
yea,  in theory buildoor doesn't need to monitor the attestations itself when using the `broadcast_validation=consensus_and_equivocation` flag in the submission body, right?
I've tried to avoid subscribing to raw attestations as it's quite some overhead.   But the aggregates come in too late :/
